terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.welcome: Welcome to VoyageGH. By using our platform, you agree to the following terms and conditions.
terms.s1: By accessing and using VoyageGH, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our service.
terms.s2: VoyageGH is an AI-powered travel agency platform that generates personalized travel itineraries for destinations in Ghana. We provide trip planning, booking, and review services.
terms.s3: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate and complete information when creating an account.
terms.s4: All bookings are subject to availability. Prices are displayed in Ghana Cedis (GH₵) and may change without notice. Payment processing is handled by our secure payment partners.
terms.s5: You may cancel a booking up to 48 hours before the trip start date for a full refund. Cancellations within 48 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.
terms.s6: Travel itineraries are generated by artificial intelligence and should be used as recommendations. Actual experiences may vary. We recommend confirming details with local providers.
terms.s7: By submitting a review, you grant VoyageGH a non-exclusive license to use, modify, and display your review content. Reviews must be truthful and not violate any laws.
terms.s8: VoyageGH is not liable for any damages arising from the use of our service, including but not limited to trip disruptions, inaccurate AI recommendations, or third-party service failures.
terms.s9: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains how VoyageGH collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.s1: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, and booking details. We also collect usage data such as pages visited and interactions with our platform.
privacy.s2: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process bookings, send booking confirmations, and personalize your experience. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s3: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal data. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
privacy.s4: We use third-party services (Clerk for authentication, Paystack for payments) that may collect information. Their privacy policies govern their use of your data.
privacy.s5: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and improve your experience. You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.
privacy.s6: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at support@voyagegh.com to exercise these rights.
privacy.s7: Our service is not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy.s8: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the new policy on this page.
